Sectors

Industries we serve

We have experience advising clients across a broad range of sectors in Mumbai, Thane, and Navi Mumbai.

Real Estate & Infrastructure

Developers, contractors, and infrastructure projects.

Financial Services

NBFCs, intermediaries, and finance businesses.

Information Technology

IT, software, and technology-enabled services.

Manufacturing

Manufacturers across industrial and consumer goods.

Travel & Tourism

Travel, hospitality, and tourism operators.

Insurance

Insurers and insurance intermediaries.

Power & Energy

Power generation, distribution, and energy.

Logistics

Logistics, transport, and supply-chain businesses.

Gems & Jewellery

Gems, jewellery, and allied trades.

Textiles

Textile manufacturing and trading.

Engineering & Technology

Engineering, EPC, and technology firms.

Healthcare & Hospitality

Healthcare providers and hospitality businesses.

Work in one of these sectors?

Get in touch to discuss tax, audit, or advisory support for your business.

DPS & Co, Chartered Accountants

Tax, audit, assurance and advisory services for businesses and individuals across Mumbai, Thane, Navi Mumbai. Established 2016.
